notes:
Crashes on startup with "Win32 function failed: HRESULT: 0x80004005
Call: at line 230 in file \Graphics_DisplayM.cpp".

TVRUHH works fine if you install Wine 4.x, install Windows steam inside that, and run it from there, so there's no fundamental incompatibility with Wine; it just doesn't play nice with Proton.
title: The Void Rains Upon Her Heart

notes: PROTON_USE_WINED3D was necessary to prevent it from crashing instantly on startup; with that change, it runs fine and without any performance issues.
title: The Void Rains Upon Her Heart
